meta.title: CreatorStack AI Playground
meta.author: Fellyph Cintra
meta.description: A local WordPress Playground setup for testing CreatorStack AI.

siteOptions.blogdescription: Disposable WordPress site for plugin testing

steps.code:
<?php
$plugins = array(
	'/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/creatorstack-ai/creatorstack-youtube-connector.php' => 'CreatorStack AI YouTube Connector',
	'/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/creatorstack-ai/creatorstack-ai.php'               => 'CreatorStack AI',
);

foreach ( $plugins as $file => $name ) {
	if ( ! file_exists( $file ) ) {
		throw new Exception( $name . ' plugin file is missing at ' . $file );
	}
}

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';

if ( ! defined( 'WTTBA_VERSION' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI did not load.' );
}

if ( ! class_exists( '\\WTTBA\\Plugin' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'CreatorStack AI plugin class is unavailable.' );
}

if ( ! function_exists( 'wp_is_connector_registered' ) || ! wp_is_connector_registered( 'youtube' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'The YouTube connector is not registered.' );
}

$connector = function_exists( 'wp_get_connector' ) ? wp_get_connector( 'youtube' ) : null;
if ( ! is_array( $connector ) || 'creatorstack-ai/creatorstack-youtube-connector.php' !== ( $connector['plugin']['file'] ?? '' ) ) {
	throw new Exception( 'The YouTube connector is not associated with the YouTube connector plugin.' );
}
